---
title: "Tools and Practices to Support Group Decision Making"
author: "Inclusive Facilitation Series"
description: "Rrecognize the stages of participatory decision making and the type of thinking (divergent, emergent, or convergent) required for each stage"
categories: [
    "<span style='color:#0096c7'>Practice Entrepreneurialism</span>",
    "<span style='color:#0096c7'>Work with Adaptability</span>", 
    "<span style='color:#ff9500'>Distributed Leadership</span>", 
    "<span style='color:#ff9500'>Systems Thinking & Synthesis</span>", 
    "<span style='color:#55a630'>Active Listening</span>",
    "<span style='color:#55a630'>Build Capacity in Others</span>",
    "<span style='color:#55a630'>Embrace Complexity</span>",
    "<span style='color:#55a630'>Move at the Speed of Trust</span>", 
    "<span style='color:#55a630'>Work to Transform Power</span>", 
    "<span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Achieve Progress Towards Goals Mission and Vision</span>",
    "<span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Deliver High Quality Results</span>",
    "<span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Drive Cycles of Continuous Improvement and Evolution</span>"
    ]
---

## Session Materials

To visit this session's materials, click [here](https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/inclusive-facilitation/content/decision-making.html) or see below.

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/inclusive-facilitation/content/decision-making.html" height="550" width="800" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
